title.en: Google Introduces Device Bound Session Credentials to Protect Browser Cookies
title.zh: Google 推出设备绑定会话凭证，强化浏览器 Cookie 安全防护

summary.en: Google's security team has published details on Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC), a new web platform security mechanism that cryptographically binds browser cookies to a specific device using hardware-backed keys. DBSC addresses cookie theft attacks where stolen session cookies are replayed from other machines, a common attack vector against web applications. The proposal builds on existing secure enclave hardware already present in modern devices and is designed for eventual standardization as a web platform primitive. It is a significant step forward for authentication security on the web.
summary.zh: Google 安全团队发布了设备绑定会话凭证（DBSC）的详细介绍，这是一种新的 Web 平台安全机制，通过硬件密钥将浏览器 Cookie 与特定设备进行加密绑定。DBSC 解决了 Cookie 被盗后在其他设备上重放的攻击问题，这是针对 Web 应用的常见攻击向量。该提案基于现代设备中已有的安全飞地硬件，并被设计为未来标准化的 Web 平台原语，是 Web 身份验证安全的重要进步。

title.en: Microsoft Suspends Dev Accounts for High-Profile Open Source Projects
title.zh: 微软暂停多个知名开源项目的开发者账户

summary.en: Microsoft has suspended the developer accounts of contributors to several high-profile open source projects, reportedly as part of a coordinated policy action. The suspensions affected maintainers of major projects hosted on GitHub, raising concerns about platform dependency risk for critical open-source infrastructure. The incident re-ignited debate about the risks of relying on a single corporate platform for open source hosting and the need for resilient, decentralized alternatives. The story gathered 349 Hacker News upvotes and 116 comments.
summary.zh: 微软暂停了多个知名开源项目贡献者的开发者账户，据报道此举是某项协调政策行动的一部分。被暂停的账户涉及 GitHub 上托管的重要项目维护者，引发外界对关键开源基础设施平台依赖风险的担忧。此事再次点燃了关于依赖单一企业平台进行开源托管风险的讨论，以及构建更具韧性的去中心化替代方案的必要性。该报道在 Hacker News 获得 349 个赞和 116 条评论。
